purpose: Final-modeling pass for replacing RJ-3 candidate/procedural assets with self-authored final-asset candidates after the initial three-asset pilot validation.
completionDiscipline: These assets can become accepted-final only after GLB validation, Browser screenshot review, and explicit final-category promotion with proof fields.

assets.label: RJ-3 final-modeled hero HQ building
assets.license: self-authored project asset; internal reuse allowed
notes: Standalone modern HQ with individual windows, command atrium cutaway, roof systems, vehicles, drone, landscaping, status anchors.
Self-authored procedural model for an internal final-asset pilot; no third-party mesh content.
